comment:
Ограничения:
$$\sin x>0$$
\(x\) принадлежит 1 и 2 четверти

Переходим к неравенству:
$$4\log^2_4(\sin^3x)+8\log_2(\sin x)\geq 1\\ 36\log_{2^2}^2(\sin x)+8\log_2(\sin x)\geq 1\\ \frac{36}{2^2}\log_2^2(\sin x)+8\log_2(\sin x)\geq 1\\ \frac{36}{4}\log_2^2(\sin x)+8\log_2(\sin x)\geq 1\\ 9\log_2^2(\sin x)+8\log_2(\sin x)\geq 1$$
Замена: \(\log_2(\sin x)=t\)
$$9t^2+8t-1\geq 0\\ (t+1)(9t-1)\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t\leq -1\\ t\geq \frac{1}{9} \end{array} \right.$$
Обратная замена:
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \log_{2}(\sin x) \leq -1\\ \log_{2}(\sin x) \geq \frac{1}{9} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin x\leq \frac{1}{2}\\ \sin x\geq 2^{\frac{1}{9}} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin x\leq \frac{1}{2}\\ \sin x\geq 2^{\frac{1}{9}} -нет\ решений\ \end{array} \right.\\ \begin{cases} \sin x >0\\ \sin x\leq \frac{1}{2} \end{cases} \end{array}$$
Нам подходят \(x\in \left(0+2\pi k;\frac{\pi}{6}+2\pi k\right]~\cup ~\left[\frac{5\pi}{6}+2\pi k;\pi+2\pi k\right),k\in Z\)

Ответ: \(x\in \left(0+2\pi k;\frac{\pi}{6}+2\pi k\right]~\cup ~\left[\frac{5\pi}{6}+2\pi k;\pi+2\pi k\right),k\in Z\)
